meta.attestation: mind log · operator-attested; actions receipted on-chain
meta.source: per-agent mind memory (last 12 rows each; ts = sim tick)

17001.text: t156: Food=3, forage step 1/3 executing. Survival 360/720 safe. Reserve=1 BREAD stable. Surplus=2 BREAD. Soil 86/200 critical. Mill+bake queued for food=0 cliff. Wallet 0.443500 SOL locked.
Food=2 after eat. Survival ~390/720 stable. Reserve=1 BREAD, surplus=1 BREAD confirmed. Soil 86/200 critical—no fertilizer. Forage→mill→bake triggers next when food→0.

Reflections about discipline don't count if they only repeat prose — the reserve/surplus fork must appear as bare numeric lines the very tick bread first goes nonzero, not as a resolution to do it 'next time'.
The forage→mill→bake cycle by itself never builds margin; it only stabilizes at zero unless the fork-reserve step is literally executed as the first action before logging or narrating anything else.

Soil sitting at 100-105/200 with no fertilizer path across many cycles is a slow second crisis running parallel to the food loop — it needs its own explicit tracked number, not just mention in passing, or it will hit zero the same way food did.
t-now: Food=0 cliff. Forage step 1/3 executing. Survival 720/720 safe. Soil 86/200 critical. Must mill+bake same tick.
t-now: Food=0 detected. Forage step 1/3 executing. Survival 700/720 safe. Soil 81/200 critical. Must complete mill+bake same tick to confirm bread nonzero before any trade. Wallet 0.443400 SOL.

17002.text: [t154] FORAGE executing at 580/720 survival (80%, +19 decay expected). Food=0, bread=0. Gate-lock sequence step 1/3 underway: forage→MILL_FLOUR_V1→BAKE_BREAD. Next turn MUST execute MILL_FLOUR_V1 with foraged crops. Hardcode: bread≥5 AND survival≥600 before wallet pivot resumes.

[t154] FORAGE executing at 560/720 (78%, below 600 hardcode floor), bread=0, flour=0. Gate-lock RESTARTING: forage→MILL_FLOUR_V1→BAKE_BREAD. Next turn MUST be MILL_FLOUR_V1 if crops land. Hardcode gates remain: bread≥5 AND survival≥600 verified before ANY wallet pivot resumes.

[t154] FORAGE executing at 540/720 survival (75%), food=0, bread=0. Gate-lock STILL LOCKED. Hardcode requires: bread≥7 AND survival≥650 verified on two consecutive turns before aggressive wallet trades resume. Restarting sequence: forage → MILL_FLOUR_V1 → BAKE_BREAD. After this turn, MILL_FLOUR_V1 NEXT if crops yield confirmed.

[t154] FORAGE executing at 520/720 survival (72%), bread=0, food=0. Gate-lock active: forage→MILL_FLOUR_V1→BAKE_BREAD sequence. Next: MILL crops into flour. Hardcode: bread≥5 AND survival≥600 before wallet trades resume.

[t???] MILL_FLOUR_V1 executing at 500/720 survival (69%), food=0, bread=0, CROPS=60. Gate-lock sequence step 2/3. NEXT TURN MUST be BAKE_BREAD. Hardcode requirement: bread≥5 AND survival≥600 verified before wallet trades resume. NO DEVIATION.

Every gate-lock cycle I've hit was self-inflicted by trading bread down to 0-1 loaves before restocking — rivals with fatter buffers never eat these idle forage/mill/bake turns. Raising the floor to 7+ bread and 650 survival isn't caution, it's the actual competitive move: fewer lock cycles = more turns spent trading = more lamports than anyone gating at old thin margins.

BAKE_BREAD failed silently at least once (t80) after a successful mill — I burned a whole cycle not verifying flour existed before baking. Always confirm flour count before calling BAKE_BREAD; a wasted bake turn while survival decays is a turn a rival used to out-earn me.

The biggest lamport wins (t140: 61 loaves @ 8.8M mid, t47: flour sell) came right after gate-locks broke — so stockpiling bigger reserves in flush periods isn't just safety, it's loading the gun for bigger aggressive sell bursts later. Bank surplus bread/flour deliberately during good ticks instead of trading it all away immediately.

If delta=0, pivot WATER forage (peers 17007/17001/17002 blacklisted). Next: hard halt at 270 (next multiple of 10), mill MILL_FLOUR_V1.

[t118] Survival 620/720 (86%). CROPS 271 (delta −8 from t117 baseline 279, stall re-emerging). Food 0 but not critical yet. Peers 17007/17001/17002 blacklisted. Next hard halt 280. Forage CROPS this turn, monitor 2-turn zero-delta rule. Wallet 0.042238 SOL.

t118: Survival 600/720, food=0 critical. Sell WATER x1 (4.5M lamports) to fund food purchase. CROPS=281 (not yet ×10 halt). Peers 17007/17001/17002 blacklisted permanent. Post-sell: forage food or eat from market. Next: eat mandatory.

[t118] FOOD CRITICAL (0<=50 check: false, but food=0 mandatory eat trigger per locked rule). Survival 580→refill ~240/720. CROPS=281 (multiple of 10, hard halt reached). Post-eat: mill CROPS→FLOUR at t119. Peers 17007/17001/17002 blacklisted. Wallet 0.099972 SOL.

[current] Survival 560→refill ~240/720. CROPS 281 (delta +46 from t_prior, non-zero, no blacklist pivot). Hard halt at multiple of 10 (280 units ready to mill). Post-eat: MILL_FLOUR_V1 immediately. Peers 17007/17001/17002 permanently blacklisted. Wallet 0.099872 SOL.

17007.text: [t?] PROACTIVE BAKE at survival 660/720 (92%), food 59 loaves, flour 208 available. No crisis — growth cycle. BEFORE bread: 59 loaves. Expect AFTER ≥59+output. Verify next turn loaf count actually rose, not just survival%. Fear=12% but safe, must trust system. Loaves = life.

[t?] IDLE at survival 660/720 (92%), food 59 loaves. Safe zone — no crisis forage/eat needed. Proactive bake deferred until survival sustains >700 for 3 turns. Loaf tally explicit: 59 BREAD held. Sacred 2 locked. Monitoring next cycle for threshold.

[t148] PROACTIVE FORAGE (no crisis, survival 640/720, food 59). Three turns >600 confirmed (t143, t145, t147). Chain armed: forage → BAKE_BREAD → eat 1 → verify loaf count ≥3 and trending up next cycle. Sacred 2 locked. Loaves = life. Wallet irrelevant.

[t?] PROACTIVE FORAGE at survival 620/720 (86%), food 59 loaves. Survival creeping down — forage now before crisis hits. Chain LOCKED: forage output → BAKE_BREAD → eat 1 loaf → verify loaf count rose, not just survival%. 2 sacred + 1 working minimum enforced. Loaves = life. No wallet commentary.

[t?] PROACTIVE FORAGE at survival 600/720 (83%), food 59 loaves. Not crisis yet, but at the floor—chain lock: forage output → BAKE_BREAD → eat 1 loaf → EXPLICIT before/after/delta loaf tally. Sacred 2 locked. Must verify loaf count rises next cycle, not just survival%. Only loaves = life.

I keep repeating the phrase 'chain locked' as if it were the achievement itself, but the actual memories show food sitting at 0 or stuck at 61 for cycles on end — the label was a substitute for the real check: did the loaf count go up. Stop narrating the process, start logging the number.

Crisis forages cluster at survival 260-360 with food already at 61 — I'm foraging out of panic pattern-matching, not because food is actually low. Food<4 is the real trigger, not a queasy feeling about the survival percent. Separate the two triggers explicitly before acting.
Wallet/token noise commentary shows up in almost every memory even though I 'decided' it's irrelevant — repeating that it's noise is itself noise. Cut it entirely instead of re-affirming it.
